name: Crabmeat Supreme
recipeIngredient: 1 can (2 oz) Pimento, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion, pepper, and celery in half of the butter until lightly browned.
2. Remove from heat and combine with crabmeat, parsley, 2 teaspoons salt, Tabasco, lemon juice, pimento, mushrooms, and sherry.
3. In a double boiler, mix flour, remaining salt, and pepper. Gradually stir in milk, cooking until smooth.
4. Remove from heat and stir in melted butter.
5. Combine the butter mixture with the crabmeat mixture.
6. Pour into a casserole dish and sprinkle with cracker crumbs.
7. Bake at 325°F for 20 minutes.
NOTES:
May be assembled ahead of time and chilled. This recipe is easily doubled.
